title: Mum's Vegetarian Lasagne
ingredients: 1 pack of fresh lasagne sheets or Barilla dried sheets
Lazy Garlic - as much as you desire
Other vegetables - what ever you want to add
Chopped fresh herbs to taste. e.g. Basil & Parsley
method: Grate, finely dice or process all veggies.
Using a generous amount of olive oil, fry onions until fragrant then add mushrooms & garlic.
Add the rest of the processed vegetables, chopped tomatoes, passata, and herbs. Season with salt and pepper.
Cook for at least 30 min and leave to cool - the longer the better.
Layer vegetable mix, lasange sheets and cheese sauce in alternating layers finishing with cheese sauce.
Cover with foil and bake for approx. 30 minutes, removing the foil halfway through
Let Lasagne set for 10-15 minutes prior to portioning and serving
notes: Serve with garlic bread or baked dinner rolls with salted butter.
